batch.name: Kalamazoo Stout Clone (NA)
batch.notes: Attempting to replicate Bell's Kalamazoo Stout using Athletic Brewing Dark as the base. The additive bottle goes into the fridge; dose per glass to taste starting at 1 tsp per can.

ingredients.name: Star Anise (steep only, remove before bottling)
Cold Brew or Espresso (optional, fresh per glass)

steps.name: Steep star anise in gin
steps.description: Add 3-4 star anise to 1 oz Ritual NA gin. Steep overnight.

steps.name: Strain and build bottle mix
steps.description: Strain out star anise. Combine in a small bottle: 1 oz infused gin, ½ oz Angostura bitters, ¼ oz chocolate bitters, ¼ tsp vanilla extract. Shake.

steps.name: Refrigerate
steps.description: Store the ~2 oz additive bottle in the fridge.

steps.name: Serve and dial in dose
steps.description: Open an Athletic Dark. Start with 1 tsp of bottle mix, add a pinch of cocoa powder, 1-2 red pepper flakes, and optional drop of cold brew or espresso. Taste and dose up from there.
